extraction.one_line_summary: JAKOBSEN Fabio won the sprint on 9km straight drag in wet conditions, taking race lead from teammate protection target GROENEWEGEN
tactical_patterns: Breakaway contested all intermediate sprints aggressively for bonus seconds, unusual for stage races with climbing stages ahead.
Quick-Step allowed Jakobsen to win despite Groenewegen holding race lead, revealing internal sprint hierarchy before mountains.
9km straight exposed teams unable to organize late leadouts in wet conditions; early positioning proved decisive.

rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: positive: 7th win of rookie season beating established German sprint school, now leads race overall unexpectedly
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: finished outside top-3 despite team controlling pace all day, lost race lead to own teammate
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: negative: failed to convert on home-favorite German sprinter advantage despite strong form claims
rider_signals.BEWLEY Sam: neutral: led intermediate sprint efforts for breakaway showing willingness to contest bonuses aggressively
